mapper.select: SELECT upload_id, file_name, file_size, format, total_chunks, uploaded_chunks, temp_directory, status, created_at, expires_at FROM upload_session WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO upload_session (upload_id, file_name, file_size, format, total_chunks, uploaded_chunks, temp_directory, status, created_at, expires_at) VALUES ( #{uploadId}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{format, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{totalChunks}, #{uploadedChunks}, #{tempDirectory}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE upload_session SET file_name = #{fileName}, file_size = #{fileSize}, format = #{format, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, total_chunks = #{totalChunks}, uploaded_chunks = #{uploadedChunks}, temp_directory = #{tempDirectory}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, created_at = #{createdAt}, expires_at = #{expiresAt} WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId}
